title: Can't I Fall in Love?
overview: The Asakura siblings are surprised when a new transfer student, Sakura Yoshino, appears.

title: The Dark Nemu Explodes
overview: Sakura's insistent affections manage to upset Nemu.

title: So, it's a bannana, eh?
overview: While Miharu is in the hospital, Junichi must take care of an android based on Miharu's appearance and personality.

title: Canary Under the Cherry Tree
overview: A mishap with Sakura and Nemu causes Junichi to go hungry for much of the day, but Kotori, the girl he hears singing in the park, offers him one of his favorite foods.

title: Because I'm a Maid...
overview: On a day he skips class, Jun'ichi rescues Yoriko, a cat-eared maid, from torment by local children. She offers to serve as the Asakuras' maid in return, but she has zero experience in any maid skills.

title: Let's Go to the Ocean!
overview: Jun'ichi invites his friends to the beach, little realizing a certain promise he made earlier.

title: Welcome to the Mizukoshi House!
overview: Sun'ichi helps Moe get to school under the nose of the hall monitors,and she invites him to a nabe meal in return.

title: Mysterious Poet
overview: Nemu keeps receiving various anonymous poems, from a secret admirer.

title: Because I Want You to Listen...
overview: Junichi agrees to go to Kotori's recital but in the same time he has to meet with Nemu.

title: Let's Go Outside!
overview: Jun'ichi,Nemu,Sakura,and Suginami try various plans to coas the hikikomori yoriko outside.

title: We're Only Pretending to Be Lovers!
overview: Mako asks Jun'ichi an unusual favor to help her turn down a persistent girl suitor.

title: Sakura's Chest Throbbing?
overview: Suginami sponsors a trip to a jungle-themed resort, where Moe causes a bit of a ruckus.

title: Shopping Puppy-Style
overview: As Nemu ponders the Asakuras' finances,Miharu asks Jun'ichi to take her shoping. They run into Nemu, who does a little shoping of her own.

title: A Feeling That Will Never Reach You
A Secret for Only Those Two
The Time When I'm Happy
overview: After the entire school finds out how the relationship between Junichi and Nemu has developed, Sakura and Suginami try to stop them before they take their relationship even further.

title: Feelings Brushing By
overview: Seeing Jun'ichi and Nemu closer than ever before, Sakura tries to pull them apart using Jun'ichi's sense of honor, sparking a heated quarrel between the two girls. That night, Nemu collapses in Jun'ichi's arms, with cherry blossom petals falling from her lips.

title: Sakura's Decision
overview: After a welcoming party for Sakura, the Asakuras and their friends repair the neglected Yoshino house. Sakura shoots down Aisia's hopes of magic lessons, and tries to explain the dangers of magic.

title: Wonderful Memories
overview: Nemu manages to regain consciousness, to the relief of Jun'ichi and his friends. Yoriko asks Jun'ichi for her "wages": a date at night. Together they share Yoriko's dream, going to school together and building wonderful memories with the boy Misaki fell in love with.

title: An Honest Confession
overview: Kotori realizes that her telepathic power is fading, sensing only painful noise when she tries to probe anyone but Jun'ichi. She focuses her attention on him, as being able to sense his thoughts puts her at ease; however, her friends point out that she is also falling in love.

title: The Door Into Memories
overview: Miharu the android, in order to become more like her human counterpart, attempts to search for Miharu's memories within herself, despite the fact that they weren't a part of her programming, and the fact that such searching greatly shortens her lifespan.

title: Breaking Hearts
overview: Nemu, who is still in the hospital, is visited by Mako and Suginami, but she doesn't remember who they are.

title: Final Episode
overview: Nemu, still affected by amnesia and dazed, wanders away from home. Junichi goes looking for her.

title: Two Years Since Then…
overview: Jun'ichi, with the help of his group of friends (the self-appointed "Support Team"), manages his daily life in Nemu's absence. On a stormy summer day, a mysterious young girl arrives at his door.

title: Unreadable Map
overview: Jun'ichi and Kotori decide to skip school and help the girl, Aisia, find her destination on a rain-soaked map written in a foreign language.

title: Beneath the Same Roof
overview: After learning that grandmother Yoshino is dead, and after Jun'ichi inadvertently shows his only magical skill, Aisia decides to make him her "Master". When Mako discovers her, she insists on having Aisia stay at the Mizukoshi residence.

title: Past the Rows of Cherry Trees
overview: Convinced that Jun'ichi studies at a school of magic, Aisia sneaks into Kazami Academy.

title: Magic's Tail
overview: Aisia keeps a close eye on Jun'ichi to "catch" him using magic, despite his insistence that he can only conjure Japanese confections.

title: A Letter for Miharu
overview: Rumors abound after Miharu discovers a letter in her shoe locker.

title: Crossing and Missing Each Other
overview: A fight with Nemu over Aisia living with Jun'ichi is exacerbated when he becomes jealous of the new doctor, Akishima, in the infirmary.

title: A Storm Foreseen
overview: Jun'ichi attempts to find Nemu in the rain. After another heated fight with Nemu, he confronts Dr.Akishima.

title: Unwithering Feelings
overview: Aisia (after a chat with Misaki) and Miharu concoct a scheme to get Jun'ichi and Nemu to reconcile. At the base of the dead cherry tree, Jun'ichi and Nemu talk about his grandmother.

title: I'm Joining
overview: Jun'ichi and Nemu lose sleep watching a drama series on DVD. Left alone, Aisia joins Tamaki's miko club, thinking that Shinto is an eastern form of magic. She decides to use her newfound knowledge on the school's baseball team, who is known for fifty straight losses without even a hit.

title: Writing In Progress!
overview: When Nanako has trouble making a deadline for the final chapter of her magical girl comic, Aisia decides to provide some inspiration.

title: The Two Stars of Hatsune-Jima
overview: Aisia and Alice put together a show for the hospitalized children, in particular for a young girl who loves the circus.

title: Aisia's Summer
overview: As Jun'ichi and Nemu plan for the imminent summer vacation, Aisia continues her solo magic training.

title: Door of the Heart
overview: During a trip to the beach, Aisia discovers Kotori's hidden feelings for Jun'ichi.

title: Delivering a Singing Voice
overview: Aisia tries to push Kotori closer to Jun'ichi, but Kotori accepts that she will never have him.

title: Blossoming Memories
overview: Aisia develops feelings of rivalry towards Nemu, and of affection towards Jun'ichi.

title: Nemu and Jun'ichi
overview: Aisia tries to compete with Nemu in looking after Jun'ichi (to no avail), and accompanies them on a date. She begins to understand how much Nemu cares for him, but is confused by his seeming lack of understanding or gratitude.

title: A Mirage the Color of Cherry Blossoms
overview: A blond-haired, voluptuous young woman with twin ponytails is spotted on the island. Thinking that Sakura has returned, Jun'ichi, Nemu, and their friends follow Utamaru to see if he leads them to her.

title: Sakura's Words
overview: After a welcoming party for Sakura, the Asakuras and their friends repair the neglected Yoshino house. Sakura shoots down Aisia's hopes of magic lessons, and tries to explain the dangers of magic.

title: The Season That Won't Return
overview: Confused by Sakura's rejection, Aisia asks Kotori about what happened two years ago. She decides to see if everyone's desire can come true through the cherry tree again.

title: Two Magicians
overview: Sakura talks Aisia out of trying to revive the cherry tree, but Aisia questions her desire to be with Jun'ichi.

title: Everyone's Time
overview: Sakura and the other girls try to get Nemu and Jun'ichi together during a midsummer school day.

title: The Summer of Silence
overview: Jun'ichi organizes a study session to help finish his neglected homework, but the other girls don't remember that he and Nemu are more than siblings, and even they begin to doubt their relationship.

title: Vow
overview: Sakura, who hadn't seen Jun'ichi or the girls for a day, suddenly sees the cherry blossoms revived and certain memories erased.

title: Da Capo
overview: Like a rewound clock, life becomes a semblance of what it was before Jun'ichi and Nemu became lovers. Sakura confronts Aisia's world with a warning.

title: The Bells of Happiness
overview: Although everyone now has a fair chance of being with Jun'ichi, he and Nemu become depressed. Suginami and Kotori bring the two back together to challenge this reality, and Aisia realizes the stubborn power of the cherry tree.

title: Cherry Blossoms Bloom
overview: The Newspaper Club ambition is to make the best graduation edition of the paper. But to truly stand out and beat the unofficial newspaper, conventional boring themes won’t work.

title: A Warm Place
overview: The Newspaper Club begins their investigation of the Everlasting Cherry Blossom, but Kiyotaka must deal with jealous males in the school and an overly attached Charles.

title: Where Cherry Blossoms Flutter
overview: Kiyotaka is interviewing the town when he spots a strange girl on her own near the observation point. Later, Kiyotaka looks into past articles in the library only to find articles on accidents and incidents with unknown causes. Then he finds reports of a mysterious girl spotted on the scenes, but something about it seems off.

title: A Place One Wants to Be Forever
overview: The Newspaper club has learned that when Everlasting Cherry Tree bloomed for the second time, mysterious accidents, phenomenon, and people grew in frequency. They also learn that the person who knew the most about the cherry blossom was their former principal, Yoshino Sakura. When Kiyotaka sees the picture of “Yoshino Sakura”, he’s reminded of the mysterious “Sakura” he met the other day.

title: A Place Where One Is Not Alone
overview: Kiyotaka has been spending a lot of time with Sara but can’t read between the lines. Even when Sara gets the chance after being locked in a storage closet, something urgent ruins the mood.

title: A Place Where We Can Be Together
overview: Ricca is giving Kiyotaka all the signals but is too dense to notice. Things get more complicated when he mentions to his girls that he has seeing someone.

title: A Place Where I Can Rely on You
overview: Kiyotaka was the only one to notice that Aoi wasn’t feeling well. Unable to say no, he agrees to stay with her until she is back to her energetic self. But Aoi wants more than a caretaker, she wants…

title: The Place Overflowing With Love, Dreams, and Hope
overview: After Kiyotaka finishes shopping for dinner, he stops by the Shopping District's lottery. When he spins the wheel around, he wins third prize, tickest to Sakura Park's Heated Pool!

title: A Festival of Beautiful Women and a Place With a Beautiful Sunset
overview: Kiyotaka finds himself bound together with his best friend Kousuke and surrounded by Elizabeth, Tomoe, Shiki, Ricca, and Charles in the student council's office. He still doesn't quite understand how he got there, but it seems they think he knows what Suginami and the Unofficial Newspaper Club are plotting.

title: A Place We Both Reached
overview: When Kiyotaka opens the door to Amakase Detective Agency, he's greeted by the head of the agency, Amakase Minatsu, a girl wearing a red muffler who introduces herself as a robot.

title: The Place of Memories and Beginnings
overview: Kiyotaka and Ricca meet Sakura before the everlasting cherry blossom, but the moment Ricca touches her, memories begin to flashback in both of their minds.

title: The Island of the Everlasting Cherry Blossom
overview: The members of the official newspaper club are suddenly called together by Ricca. As they walk along the cherry blossom lined road without knowing why, Sakura appears before them. Kiyotaka and the others greet her with a smile, but Sakura tells them she's decided to leave the island and asks them to play with her today.

title: Da Capo
overview: After Sakura left everyone, they all receive a new message on their phones from an unknown sender. The next day the official newspaper club decides to try and start working on the articles for their graduation special, but after considering Sakura, they decide to take a different approach.
